about.title: Road to Devcon India
about.lead: Devcon's impact starts months before the event.
about.p1: Road to Devcon brings together communities, local organizations, and new audiences through programs designed to amplify grassroots efforts and create long-term impact.
about.p2: Together, our programs keep the community active, amplify local efforts and voices, and serve as preparation for the culmination of the year: Devcon.

academic.title: Academic Program
academic.description: Connecting students, researchers, and academic institutions with the Ethereum community.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem Program
ecosystem.description: Grants and activations supporting local events and community initiatives across India.

communities.title: Road to Devcon communities
communities.cta_text: Want to help create Devcon with us?

academic.title: Academic
academic.description: Shape the next generation of Ethereum builders at your campus and bring your community to Devcon in Mumbai this November.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: We fund local projects, events, and contributors creating spaces for learning, experimentation, and coordination on the road to Devcon 8 India.

supporters.title: Supporters
supporters.description: The Supporters Program is how teams across the ecosystem contribute to Devcon and take their place within it.
